hero.ip_badge_tooltip: Your IP address is recorded for security verification

can_vote.heading: You are eligible to vote
can_vote.step_1: Click Cast Your Vote below to begin
can_vote.step_2: Enter your secure, single-use voting code
can_vote.step_3: Select your candidates for each position
can_vote.step_4: Confirm — your anonymous ballot is cast

has_voted.heading: Your ballot has been cast
has_voted.body: Your vote has been securely recorded. Thank you for participating in this election. Your ballot is completely anonymous and cannot be linked back to your identity.

not_eligible.heading: You are not eligible to vote in this election
not_eligible.body: Your account is not registered as an eligible voter for {election}. If you believe this is an error, please contact the election administrator.
